text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days have passed since the shocking news
broke. It may be due to nerves, but Eishin Flash
doesn't have her usual vigor.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Nice running, Flash. But this one's my win!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I started sprinting five seconds later than
planned... What a careless mistake.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I was thinking this while we were on the track, but
like... You seem kinda off today.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You usually zoom past me like a rocket, but
today you were more like... I dunno, a can of soda
fizzing out, I guess?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Like, I can't explain it, but there was no whoosh going on. Y'know, like, WHOOSH! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: No probs.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
And, as a member of the previous generation, she
has a wealth of experience. She took advantage
of my carelessness with ease.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Should I face a racer with even more experience
than Jordan at the autumn Tenno Sho...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's probably thinking about the runners on the
news. They're a threat for sure, but there's
something even more worrisome than that.
choice_data_list:
You'll be fine if you let go of your worries and
simply run.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
But if I mistime my actions, it'll create a chain of
even worse mistakes.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I can't prevail over the others like that. However,
the same is true if I take no action... The
probability of reaping unsatisfactory results is
high.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
In which case, perhaps the race schedule itself
should be revised.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The fiercer the competitions I take on, the more
fatigued I will become.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
For instance, if we remove the G1, which we know
will be an intense race, then I would be free to
focus entirely on the autumn Tenno Sho.
choice_data_list:
You should be fine as long as you continue to
improve, though.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I wonder about that...
choice_data_list: What is it you really want to do?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Pardon me, but please give me a little time to
think.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later that night, Eishin Flash sends me a message
with a fully revamped schedule attached.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I removed the Osaka Hai and spring Tenno Sho in
favor of G2 and G3 races.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
These changes are to ensure I won't overtax
myself and will be in peak condition for the
autumn Tenno Sho...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I summon Eishin Flash to my office to discuss the
drastic—and frankly self-deprecating—changes
she made to her schedule.
choice_data_list: Why did you make these changes?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I would like to preserve my track record, so I
decided it would be more prudent to pursue a
conservative path than to risk crushing defeat.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Were I to run against senior opponents in the G1,
I would indubitably become burdened with
exhaustion and become more prone to making
mistakes.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
As a result, I could perform disappointingly at the
autumn Tenno Sho... In front of my parents, no
less.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
And if that is what I'm risking, I'd rather be more
flexible than stick stubbornly to my original plan.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Just like you.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Your flexible ideas were what propelled me
forward both before and after the Derby.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: It's a positive change. Right now...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
This is the most optimal race schedule I can
devise for myself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She said it's a "positive" change... but all it looks
like to me is that she's afraid of failure.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What she needs now isn't a schedule change, but
a chance to face herself without disillusionment.
To do that, she needs to clear her mind.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: So what is it you wanted to ask me about?
choice_data_list:
I wanted to talk to you about Flash since you
know her so well.

I wanted to talk to you about Flash since you
know her so well.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, I dunno about that. ☆ But! I do see her
every day at the dorm!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Which is how I know she's got a lot on her plate
right now.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: You know what? What Flash really needs is...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: The blue sea and a white, sandy beach! ♪
